messages: RustClaw is organized with modular Rust crates for core logic, platform-specific services (Telegram, WhatsApp, Lark/Feishu), UI components, Docker/container configs, scripts for deployment/orchestration, and supporting directories for data, logs, docs, and migrations.
result_json.text: RustClaw is organized with modular Rust crates for core logic, platform-specific services (Telegram, WhatsApp, Lark/Feishu), UI components, Docker/container configs, scripts for deployment/orchestration, and supporting directories for data, logs, docs, and migrations.
